# Casa Escondida Anilao Resort & Dive Center

> Boutique ocean-front PADI 5-Star dive resort in Anilao, Mabini, Batangas, Philippines. 31 ocean-side rooms, full dive center, restaurant, pool, and private beach access on Batangas Bay. Free breakfast included for all guests.

Casa Escondida Anilao is located in Brgy. Ligaya, Mabini, Batangas 4202 — at the heart of one of the world's premier macro-diving destinations. The resort offers a PADI 5-Star certified dive center with experienced divemasters and instructors, guided dives to 30+ named dive sites, and PADI certification courses from Open Water through Divemaster. Accommodation ranges from standard ocean-view rooms to spacious sea-view suites with hot tub. The resort is approximately 140 km south of Manila (2–3 hours by private car or van).

## Resort

- [Homepage](https://www.casaescondida-anilao.com/): Full resort overview — rooms, diving, dining, booking, and guest reviews.
- [Rooms & Suites](https://www.casaescondida-anilao.com/rooms.html): 31 ocean-side rooms — Standard Double (18 sqm), Deluxe Double/Twin (40 sqm, sea view), Suite with Sea View (50 sqm, hot tub). Breakfast included.
- [Location & Directions](https://www.casaescondida-anilao.com/location.html): How to get to Casa Escondida from Manila, NAIA, and Metro Manila — routes, fares, transport options, and resort contact details.
- [Gallery](https://www.casaescondida-anilao.com/gallery.html): Photos and videos of diving, marine life, resort facilities, and Batangas Bay.

## Dive Center

- [Dive Center & Packages](https://www.casaescondida-anilao.com/dive.html): PADI 5-Star dive center — fun dives, night dives, PADI Open Water to Divemaster courses, nitrox fills, full equipment rental, camera rinse station, private jetty.

## Travel Guides & Blog

- [Blog Index](https://www.casaescondida-anilao.com/blog.html): All articles — dive guides, marine life spotting, travel tips, resort updates.
- [Manila to Anilao Transfer Guide](https://www.casaescondida-anilao.com/blog/manila-to-anilao-transfer-guide.html): Complete 2026 guide — bus, private van, and driving routes with fares and travel times.
- [Best Dive Sites in Anilao](https://www.casaescondida-anilao.com/blog/best-dive-sites-anilao.html): Top macro dive sites including Sombrero, Arthur's Rock, Kirby's Rock, and Beatrice Rock.
- [Kirby's Rock Anilao](https://www.casaescondida-anilao.com/blog/kirbys-rock-anilao.html): Dive site guide to Kirby's Rock — depth, marine life, and conditions.
- [Best Time to Dive Anilao](https://www.casaescondida-anilao.com/blog/best-time-dive-anilao.html): Seasonal diving guide — visibility, water temperature, and marine life highlights by month.
- [PADI Open Water Course at Casa Escondida](https://www.casaescondida-anilao.com/blog/padi-open-water-course-casa-escondida.html): What to expect from a PADI Open Water certification at Casa Escondida.
- [Night Diving in Anilao](https://www.casaescondida-anilao.com/blog/night-diving-anilao.html): Guide to night diving — what to see, safety tips, and best sites.
- [Nudibranchs of Anilao](https://www.casaescondida-anilao.com/blog/nudibranchs-anilao.html): Species guide to nudibranch spotting in Anilao's reefs.
- [Frogfish in Anilao](https://www.casaescondida-anilao.com/blog/frogfish-anilao.html): How to spot frogfish — camouflage, habitats, and photography tips.
- [Pygmy Seahorses in Anilao](https://www.casaescondida-anilao.com/blog/pygmy-seahorses-anilao.html): Finding pygmy seahorses on Anilao's sea fans.
- [Whale Sharks in Batangas](https://www.casaescondida-anilao.com/blog/whale-sharks-batangas.html): Whale shark encounters near Batangas and how to dive with them responsibly.
- [Macro Photography Settings for Anilao](https://www.casaescondida-anilao.com/blog/macro-photography-settings-anilao.html): Camera settings and tips for underwater macro photography in Anilao.
- [Underwater Photography Tips](https://www.casaescondida-anilao.com/blog/underwater-photography-tips-anilao.html): Beginner and intermediate tips for shooting underwater at Anilao.
- [What to Pack for Batangas Diving](https://www.casaescondida-anilao.com/blog/what-to-pack-batangas-diving.html): Packing list for a dive trip to Anilao, Batangas.
- [Anilao Dive Trip Cost](https://www.casaescondida-anilao.com/blog/anilao-dive-trip-cost.html): Breakdown of costs for a dive trip to Anilao — accommodation, dives, transport.
- [Island BBQ at Casa Escondida](https://www.casaescondida-anilao.com/blog/island-bbq-casa-escondida.html): The resort's legendary island BBQ experience on Batangas Bay.
- [A Full Day at Casa Escondida](https://www.casaescondida-anilao.com/blog/full-day-casa-escondida.html): A day-in-the-life itinerary at the resort — morning dives to sunset dining.
- [Protecting the Coral Triangle](https://www.casaescondida-anilao.com/blog/protecting-coral-triangle.html): Casa Escondida's marine conservation efforts in the Coral Triangle.
- [Batangas Coral Restoration 2025](https://www.casaescondida-anilao.com/blog/batangas-coral-restoration-2025.html): Coral restoration initiatives in Batangas Bay.
- [Anilao Underwater Festival 2026](https://www.casaescondida-anilao.com/blog/anilao-underwater-festival-2026.html): Coverage of the annual Anilao Underwater Festival.
- [New Dive Deck & Equipment 2026](https://www.casaescondida-anilao.com/blog/new-dive-deck-equipment-2026.html): Resort updates — new dive deck and equipment additions.
